feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Section 10. Step One. Seizing her Stomach is Fundamental.

link.title: Section 10. Step One. Seizing her Stomach is Fundamental.

entry.summary: Although even considering such condition, Fuyuka seemed to pass through so many an events and to accumulate so much a tiredness by one day that drowsiness had overtaken her before she knew it.

entry.title: Section 9. Her First (Provisional) Night with Ohana.

link.title: Section 9. Her First (Provisional) Night with Ohana.

entry.summary: Evidently, Ohana was pleased with Sukeroku sushi from supermarket. The air of her tail, fluttering from the base to the tip, and her relaxed cheeks during table naturally soothed Fuyuka’s heart, regardless of her Youko identity.

entry.title: Section 8. Ohana and Supermarket.
entry.summary: Just as they set their feet in to the supermarket, peculiar to it cheesy tune poured into their ear. Yet, Fuyuka does not mind the tune that much.

entry.title: Section 7. No… Dinner!?
entry.summary: Thus, past this and that, mysterious an act of the life of Fuyuka and Ohana have had its opening. Today is Saturday, time is nigh upon five in the afternoon. Before long, an average households would start preparations for dinner.

entry.title: Section 6. Provisional Wife.
entry.summary: Even after being told of their custom of something as fixed regulations, Fuyuka could not quite follow. At any rate, the most worrisome point is what intends Ohana before her eyes to do from here on.

entry.title: Section 5. Vixen have Come Along.
entry.summary: Whilst being anxious about her crimson cheeks due to physical factors, Fuyuka was returning homewards together with vixen named Ohana. Bouncing ears and tail, which flared out of her body, could not be left as they were, and explaining it, the young girl easily made them vanish.

entry.title: The Flowers shall Return.
entry.summary: Today I have moved forth the test-version of slightly redesigned web-site. It is very rough now, and will work only in modern browsers (IE, for instance, had not been even tested), but what else do we need, right? That said, the web-site is still WIP (ever since the very December), and some bugs are present indeed.

entry.title: Section 4. Vixen in white Kimono.
entry.summary: The brain of Fuyuka have suspended itself. Apparently, amount of intelligence which she may accept as human was past tolerable. “Well, err—…?” The maiden who has bowed politely a moment ago, witness lady motionless, spoke to her in bashful voice. However, as no reaction befallen her all the same, she grew anxious, and, chon,1 pinched the clothes of miko by the side. [Chon] - touch softly; back

entry.title: Section 3. Mysterious Mystery at the Shrine.

link.title: Section 3. Mysterious Mystery at the Shrine.

entry.summary: Fuyuka was ready to fall to her knees in frustration. She could not expect to be invited to uninhabited shrine. “Is this what they call yukai-han…?”1 The scenery is resplendent in its architecture, however, in spite of the holiday, say nothing of worshippers and tourists, not even Shinto priests or other shrine workers might be spotted. This fact plainly apprised her that something as exorcism is not practised thereat. [Yukai-han] - criminal who takes delight in people’s reaction to their crimes; back

entry.title: Section 2. For the Grief of being Rejected.

link.title: Section 2. For the Grief of being Rejected.

entry.summary: “I’m sorry. I enjoyed time with you, Fuyuka, but still I have a family of my own.” “…Ha?”
